overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a robed character walking through a misty winter courtyard toward a massive gothic castle entrance. The scene features snow-dusted cobblestones, stone fountains, and other robed NPCs populating the grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with central tiered fountain

events.description: character rounds the left side of the central fountain, shifting path to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the courtyard toward the castle, passing the fountain on the left side

notable_agents.action: robed student walking in the same direction toward the castle
student sitting on stone bench to the right

entered.detail: massive stone castle facade with pointed arches and tall windows looming in the distance
multi-tiered circular stone fountain with water basin in the courtyard center
trimmed green hedge lining the right side of the walkway
stone bench with students sitting along the right side
ornate black metal lantern on stone pedestal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide castle courtyard with a central tiered fountain. The character walks forward on cobblestones toward a massive gothic cathedral facade in the distance, passing a stone bench where students sit on the right. The atmosphere is misty and overcast with snow visible on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone walkway lined with hedges and benches

events.description: passing the fountain, entering the bench-lined walkway section of the courtyard
passing by multiple students seated on stone benches along the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cobblestone path, passing seated students and stacked stone planters

notable_agents.action: student reading a book while sitting on stone bench
robed figure walking ahead toward the castle entrance

entered.detail: stacked terracotta and stone planters with red flowers and snow
patches of snow along the edges of the cobblestone path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the fountain, the character walks along a cobblestone path lined with hedges and benches. Students sit on stone benches to the right, some reading, while stacked planters with snow and red flowers dot the landscape. The castle facade grows larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to main entrance with stone balustrades and gargoyles

events.description: approaching the grand staircase flanked by winged gargoyle statues

agents.ego_description: walking toward the imposing entrance, passing winged stone gargoyle statues and snow-covered planters

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking up the stairs toward the entrance ahead

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the castle entrance with snow on the steps
large stone winged gargoyle statues flanking the staircase approach
massive carved wooden double doors at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the final stretch toward the castle entrance. The sky becomes mostly blocked by the towering facade. Winged gargoyle statues flank the approach, and a wide stone staircase with snow-dusted steps leads up to massive wooden doors. Other robed figures are seen ascending ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to carved wooden entrance doors

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone steps toward the castle entrance
approaching the large carved wooden doors at the top of the staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the massive wooden castle doors, following the figure ahead

notable_agents.action: figure entering through the large wooden doors ahead

entered.detail: massive ornate wooden doors with metal studs and intricate carvings
pointed stone archway framing the entrance door
wall-mounted lanterns flanking the door with greenery decorations

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending the grand stone staircase toward the castle entrance. The space becomes more enclosed as the character climbs, with the massive carved wooden doors and stone archway dominating the view. Decorative sconces flank the entrance as the character reaches the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward progression from a wide, misty courtyard toward the imposing entrance of a gothic castle. It begins by moving past a tiered fountain and students resting on stone benches, with the overcast sky casting a gray light over the snow-dusted cobblestones. As the camera advances, the path narrows between hedges and planters of red flowers, causing the distant cathedral facade to loom larger and more dominant in the frame. The scene then shifts toward the castle's base, where winged gargoyle statues flank the approach and the open sky is gradually blocked by the towering stone architecture. Finally, the perspective ascends a grand, snow-covered staircase, moving into an enclosed space dominated by massive carved wooden doors and decorative sconces.
